features.title: Crawler for Taipei DOT listing with pagination and dedupe
doneCriteria: crawl_sources.py discovers PDF links across pages
Supports PageSize fallback strategy
Stores title/date/sourceUrl/pdfUrl with dedupe and request politeness
evidence: scripts/crawl_sources.py implemented with pagination, PDF extraction, URL dedupe, delay, User-Agent, and source logging
features.name: Crawler for Taipei DOT listing with pagination and dedupe
features.description: crawl_sources.py discovers PDF links across pages; Supports PageSize fallback strategy; Stores title/date/sourceUrl/pdfUrl with dedupe and request politeness

features.title: Single PDF importer and parser with confidence/review flags
doneCriteria: import_pdf.py supports --url and --file
Table-first parser with text fallback
Extracts required columns and stores raw fact text
Parses violation count/type/alcohol and writes needsReview when incomplete
evidence: scripts/import_pdf.py and scripts/pdf_parser.py implemented for URL/file imports, pdfplumber table parsing, text fallback, confidence, needsReview, count/type/alcohol parsing
features.name: Single PDF importer and parser with confidence/review flags
features.description: import_pdf.py supports --url and --file; Table-first parser with text fallback; Extracts required columns and stores raw fact text; Parses violation count/type/alcohol and writes needsReview when incomplete

features.name: Cached geocoding and optional map tab

features.name: Frontend pagination and harness hardening
features.title: Frontend pagination and harness hardening
features.description: Expose the records API pagination in the dashboard and refresh harness restart/documentation state after review and cleanup.
doneCriteria: Dashboard shows total, current page, and previous/next controls
Filters reset record pagination to page 1
E2E tests assert pagination summary and boundary button states
Harness validator passes with lifecycle and state restart markers
evidence: PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH npm run test:e2e -> pass with elevated localhost permission
